productDisplayName: Being Human Women Dial Strap Purple Watch
description: Uber cool and stylish, this limited edition analogue wrist watch from Bollywood superstar Salman Khan's NGO, being human, is designed for the fashion forward. Stylish to the T with a sporty look, it's a great addition to your wardrobe.Case diameter: 40 mmCase thickness: 10 mmDial shape: RoundStainless steel and fibre case with rubber strap for enhanced durability, comfort and styleRubber strap in mat finish with branding for enhanced durability, comfort and styleFixed stainless steel purple bezel, with 15, 30, 45 and 60 markings and select minute markings in steel for added durability, style and easy time measurementFibre holders fixed to the dial with stainless steel screwsMetallic tang clasp with branding to hold the watch in place like a buckle, and for stylePurple dial with stylishly etched pink border and carved out index markings and '6' and '12' pointersLuminous hands and index markers for visibility in low light conditionsVertical date and horizontal day box in 'T' shape at '3' mark arrow at '3' mark pointing to accurate dateBranding below '12' markJapanese movement technology for enhanced durability and accurate time measurementMetallic crown to adjust date/day/timeStainless steel back with brand logo and main features of watch10 ATM water resistance tested using the equivalent static depth rating, with resistance at 50 meters, allowing you to use it even when snorkelling, skin-diving, and swimming
